title: 菊花賞の後に・堕ちゆく

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And the winner of this final race of the Classic
Triple Crown is—

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O! Our winner is T.M. Opera O! The
operatic king takes the honor of the
chrysanthemum race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: What am I doing?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
It's because I forgot... because I got roped into
this nonsense!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Ayabe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I head back to my room and reflect on the day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Admire Vega is clearly losing her spark.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she wants to continue dedicating her
achievements to her late sister, the Arima Kinen
at the end of the year could be her next goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Or maybe she'd prefer the Senior Spring Triple
Crown, which I've also been prepping materials
for, just in case.
choice_data_list: Or maybe... we should forget all that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To achieve her goal, I think she needs to take a
bit of an extended break.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In that case, aiming for the Takarazuka Kinen
next summer would be best. I begin compiling
documents to present to her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The night after the Kikuka Sho...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (I'm such a disgrace.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(I can do more... I have to keep pushing myself,
giving everything I have...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Until there's nothing left!)
Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
...Hi. Where are you off to? It's already past
curfew.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Night training. I already put in a request.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Training, huh...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Did you... discuss that with your trainer?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: ...You haven't, have you?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Ayabe... Please don't burn yourself out.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
We just finished a race yesterday. You could at
least try to rest a little more before—

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: What does it matter?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: This doesn't concern you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: It does too! What are you even saying?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
We've race each other in the Satsuki Sho, the
Japanese Derby, the Kikuka Sho, and even long
before that!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
After all that running, all those races... do you
really think I don't care about you?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Stop.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
You're going to get yourself hurt! Please, you
need to take care of yourself!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Stop it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Please, just go back to your dorm and get some
rest!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: You can gather your strength, then you can get back to training...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: That way, when we compete again—

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Stop it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her sharp rejection echoes through the still air of
the night.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Ayabe...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Just stop. You've said enough.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Just stay away from me!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Ah!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...You shine too bright.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
So don't come any closer. Don't shine your light
on me.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Or else I won't be able to see her. I won't be able
to talk to her anymore.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
The starlight can't reach me unless I'm in the dark.
I have to stay in the darkness...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: So, please... please.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Don't shine your light on me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The night is painted in a deep and gloomy
darkness...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While the faint starlight glows over my documents
for the Takarazuka Kinen.
